sqlMap.select: select * from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into IntellectualPropSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients NumberOfAttorneys NumberOfPatentAgents IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch IsClientAwareOfDeadlines IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch IsApplEmployContractAttorneys IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter# #IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval# #IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days# #IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient# #IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty# #IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney# #IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients# #NumberOfAttorneys# #NumberOfPatentAgents# #IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch# #IsClientAwareOfDeadlines# #IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm# #ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc# #IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes# #IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty# #ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc# #IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch# #IsApplEmployContractAttorneys# #IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney# #IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter, IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval, IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days, IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient, IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty, IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney, IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfPatentAgents, IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch, IsClientAwareOfDeadlines, IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm, ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc, IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes, IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty, ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc, IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch, IsApplEmployContractAttorneys, IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney, IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update IntellectualPropSuppLW set
IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter = #IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter# IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter = null IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval = #IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval# IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval = null IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days = #IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days# IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days = null IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient = #IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient# IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient = null IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty = #IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty# IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty = null IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney = #IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney# IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney = null IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients = #IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients# IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients = null NumberOfAttorneys = #NumberOfAttorneys# NumberOfAttorneys = null NumberOfPatentAgents = #NumberOfPatentAgents# NumberOfPatentAgents = null IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch = #IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch# IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch = null IsClientAwareOfDeadlines = #IsClientAwareOfDeadlines# IsClientAwareOfDeadlines = null IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm = #IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm# IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm = null ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc = #ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc# ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc = null IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes = #IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes# IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes = null IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty = #IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty# IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty = null ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc = #ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc# ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc = null IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch = #IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch# IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch = null IsApplEmployContractAttorneys = #IsApplEmployContractAttorneys# IsApplEmployContractAttorneys = null IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney = #IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney# IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney = null IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp = #IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp# IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter, IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval, IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days, IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient, IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty, IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney, IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfPatentAgents, IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch, IsClientAwareOfDeadlines, IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm, ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc, IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes, IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty, ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc, IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch, IsApplEmployContractAttorneys, IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney, IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsApplLitigatedForPropMatter, IsApplHaveProcForIntPropApproval, IsApplAcceptClientReqWith90Days, IsApplHaveProcToWarnClient, IsApplHaveReviewForIntProperty, IsWorkSuperviseBySeniorAttorney, IsApplAllowRepOfInventorClients, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfPatentAgents, IsApplRequireEngLetterForPatentSearch, IsClientAwareOfDeadlines, IsApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirm, ApplicantReferMatterToForeignFirmDesc, IsApplResponsibleForPaymentsOfTaxes, IsApplEngageServiceOfThirdParty, ApplEngageServiceOfThirdPartyDesc, IsApplQualifyOpinionToScopeOfSearch, IsApplEmployContractAttorneys, IsAttorneyRevBySeniorAttorney, IsAttorneyHaveExpInIntelProp, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from IntellectualPropSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
